name: Brooklyn 2pc Acacia Wood Loveseat Set: Outdoor Furniture with Coffee Table - Christopher Knight Home
description: Enjoy the great outdoors by sharing a drink with a loved one or just stretch out with a good book on a warm day. With lovely acacia wood frames and classic slat paneling, this Christopher Knight Home Brooklyn 2pc Acacia Wood Loveseat Set highlights both assuring durability and incredible style for all to enjoy. This set features a lovely tub shape that is topped with plush water-resistant cushions that make your outdoor lounging one of luxurious comfort. Perfect for a cozy conversation or a refreshing drink, this Christopher Knight Home Brooklyn 2pc Acacia Wood Loveseat Set will quickly become your new favorite outdoor spot to unwind.
